projectDescription: A local-first knowledge operating system built on Obsidian and OpenCode that turns AI sessions, research, audits, and decisions into persistent, compounding knowledge through autonomous agentic workflows, BM25 text retrieval, and n8n automation.
keyFeatures: Persistent compounding wiki with 200+ pages across concepts, entities, and sources
Autoresearch: 3-round autonomous web research loop with Exa + webfetch
BM25 text retrieval — pure Python stdlib, zero external dependencies
13 bundled OpenCode skills for research, ingestion, querying, and more
n8n async automation with AOC v4 Enterprise pipeline (37 nodes)
Dead Letter Queue global error handler for all n8n workflows
Multi-channel alerts via Slack, Telegram, and Discord
430-test CI suite across 5 suites with GitHub Actions
OpenCode hooks: SessionStart, PostCompact, PostToolUse, Stop
Evidence vault with SHA256 checksums and security audit reporting
/think framework: 10-principle decision process for architectural decisions
Local-first: all data stays on disk, no cloud required
